summary: Implemented Succ-chain base completeness theorem for TM bimodal logic. Created SuccChainTruth.lean (truth lemma) and SuccChainCompleteness.lean (completeness theorem). Fixed SuccChainFMCS reflexive coherence. Build passes, no new axioms, 2 documented sorries (1 unused, 1 provable structural lemma).

artifacts.summary: Truth lemma for Succ-chain model with singleton Omega

verification.notes: 2 sorries in new files: (1) Box backward in truth lemma - not used in completeness, (2) structural contraction - provable by induction. 6 inherited axioms from SuccChainFMCS/SuccExistence (Task 34 targets these).
